products_covered: applications that reference this Privacy Notice (together "Amazon Services")

data_minimization.reasoning: The policy does not mention physiological data at all, so no data minimization principles are described for this category.

collected.policy_snippet: images and videos collected or stored in connection with Amazon Services
collected.purpose: To provide voice, image and camera services, respond to requests, and improve services.

data_minimization.reasoning: The policy states 'We collect your personal information in order to provide and continually improve our products and services' and lists broad categories of collection, but does not provide concrete limits or justification for why each specific type of physical data is necessary.

stored.policy_snippet: images and videos collected or stored in connection with Amazon Services
stored.purpose: To provide services, improve services, and allow users to access their content.

retention_policy.policy_snippet_deletion: You can review and delete your voice recordings, text transcripts of those recordings, and typed requests to Alexa associated with your Amazon account
retention_policy.policy_snippet_inactivity: you can choose to automatically delete your voice recordings, text transcripts, and typed requests to Alexa after a specified period of time (3 or 18 months)

shared.policy_snippet: Third-Party Service Providers: We employ other companies and individuals to perform functions on our behalf.
shared.purpose: To perform functions on Amazon's behalf such as fulfilling orders, delivering packages, providing marketing assistance, and processing payments.

physical_data.overall_privacy_risk_description: Physical data like images, videos, and voice recordings are collected and stored broadly for service provision and improvement, with sharing to third-party service providers and international transfers. While deletion options exist, retention is default and automatic deletion is optional.

collected.policy_snippet: We automatically collect and store certain types of information about your use of Amazon Services, including information about your interaction with products, content, and services available through Amazon Services.
collected.purpose: To provide and improve Amazon Services, analyze performance, fix errors, and personalize the user experience.

data_minimization.reasoning: The policy states 'We collect your personal information in order to provide and continually improve our products and services' but does not provide concrete limits or justifications for each type of behavioral data collected.

stored.policy_snippet: We automatically collect and store certain types of information about your use of Amazon Services
stored.purpose: To enable functionality, personalization, recommendations, and service improvement.

retention_policy.policy_snippet_deletion: You can review and delete Alexa voice recordings, text transcripts, and typed requests to Alexa associated with your Amazon account by visiting More > Alexa Privacy in the Alexa app and Echo Show devices or https://www.amazon.com/alexaprivacysettings.

shared.policy_snippet: We provide ad companies with information that allows them to serve you with more useful and relevant Amazon ads and to measure their effectiveness.
shared.purpose: To display interest-based ads and measure advertising effectiveness.

behavioral_data.overall_privacy_risk_description: Behavioral data is extensively collected, stored, and shared with third parties for advertising purposes, including cross-border transfers. While deletion options exist, they are primarily user-initiated rather than automatic.
